name: codex-app
title: Codex Desktop Workbench
description: Desktop Codex demos that need a light-mode current app shell with real-product-like sidebar navigation, active thread, model/permission composer, toolbar controls, Git diff review pane, and local-work metadata, without importing Terminal, Claude, Finder, browser, Office, Figma, or Premiere surfaces.
author: UI Backlot contributors
sourcePrompt: Install editable UI Backlot source into a HyperFrames project; keep the copied HTML/CSS/JS editable.
